title: Kofi and the Happy Animals
synopsis: Little Kofi explores the savanna and meets friendly animals who make different sounds and movements, learning about nature through joyful encounters.

pages.text: Kofi walks in the warm grass. The sun is bright and golden.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through tall golden grass under a warm orange sunset sky, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: A big elephant waves his trunk. Hello, elephant! Kofi waves back.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes waving at a friendly gray elephant with textured painterly skin, both surrounded by golden grass, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi waving at a friendly elephant

pages.text: A tall giraffe bends down low. Hello, giraffe! Kofi smiles big.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes looking up at a spotted giraffe bending its long neck down, painted with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors with an orange sunset background

pages.text: A zebra runs and plays. Kofi claps his hands with joy.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes clapping while watching an expressive zebra with bold black and white stripes running through golden grass, painted in gouache with textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Kofi watching a zebra run and play

pages.text: All the animals are happy. Kofi loves his animal friends!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes standing with elephant, giraffe, and zebra all together in golden savanna grass under orange sunset, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes and warm colors
illustration.alt: Kofi with all his animal friends together

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What does the elephant do when Kofi sees him?
questions.explanation: The elephant waves his trunk to say hello to Kofi!

questions.question: Which animal has a long neck?
questions.explanation: The giraffe has a long neck and bends down to see Kofi!

questions.question: How does Kofi feel about the animals?
questions.explanation: Kofi is happy and loves all his animal friends!
